chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.1200 of 2024 Cr. Bail Application No.1302 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 20.11.2024 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Bhutta alongwith M. Zareef Lakho, Advocate for applicants a/w applicants. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Advocate for complainant. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicants Imam Ali and Zakir Shah are seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.352/2024 U/s 147,148,149, 324, 337 A(i), 337-G, 506-B PPC of P.S. Manghopir, Karachi. Applicants are present on interim pre arrest bail granted to them vide order dated 31.05.2024 and 12.06.2024 and today matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. Learned counsel for applicants submits that after filing of these pre arrest bail applications, the trial court has granted bail to all the accused in this case including the ones who were behind the bars. Since a fresh ground has occurred in favour of the applicants, he is pleading for protective bail so that he could file a fresh bail application before the trial court. This proposal has not been opposed by learned APG. Hence these bail applications are converted into protective bail applications and applicants are granted protective bail only for 05 days from today on the same surety already furnished by them, to surrender before the concerned court and file application for bail, which, however, shall be decided on its own merits independent of previous orders. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 05 days from today or surrender of the applicants before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. The Cr.

This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 05 days from today or surrender of the applicants before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. The Cr. Bail Applications are disposed of. J U D G E A.K
